segments.text: Then Eliphaz the Temanite answered and said,
Would a wise man answer with such empty ‘knowledge’ that is just a lot of hot air?
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: He wouldn't argue with unprofitable speeches using words that do no good.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: But you are doing away with the fear of God, and destroying communion with him.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: It's your sins that are doing the talking, and you are choosing deceptive words.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Your own mouth is condemning you, not me; your own lips are testifying against you.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Were you the very first person to be born? Were you born before the hills were created?
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Were you there listening in God's council? Does wisdom only belong to you?
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: What do you know that we don't? What do you understand that we don't?
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: We have among us old, gray-haired people much older than your father!
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Are the comforts God provides too little for you? Are God's gentle words not enough for you?
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Why do you let yourself be carried away by your emotions?
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Why do your eyes flash in anger that you turn against God and let yourself speak this way?
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Who can say they are clean? Which human being can say that they do what is right?
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Look, God doesn't even trust his angels—even the heavenly beings are not pure in his sight!
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: How much less pure are those who are unclean and corrupt, drinking in sin like water!
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: If you are ready to listen to me, I will show you. I will explain my insights.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: This is what wise men have said, confirmed by their ancestors,
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: those to whom alone the land was given before foreigners ever were there.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: The wicked writhe in pain all their lives, through all the years these oppressors survive.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Terrifying sounds fill their ears; even when they think they're safe, the destroyer will attack them.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: They don't believe they will escape the darkness—they know a sword is waiting for them.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They wander around looking for food, asking ‘Where is it?’ They know that their day of darkness is close at hand.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Misery and torment overwhelm them like a king preparing for battle.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They shake their fists in God's face, defiantly challenging the Almighty,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: insolently attacking him with their shields.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They have become fat in their rebellion, their bellies bloated with fat.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: But their cities will become desolate; they will live in abandoned houses that are crumbling into ruins.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They will lose their riches, their wealth will not endure, their possessions will not spread over the earth.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They will not escape from the darkness. Like a tree whose shoots are burned up in a forest fire, the breath of God will blow him away.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They should not trust in things that are worthless, for their reward will be worthless.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: This will be paid in full before their time has come. They are like tree branches that wither,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: like vines that lose their unripe grapes, or olive trees that lose their flowers.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: For those who reject God are barren,  and fire will burn up the homes of those who love bribes.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They plan trouble and produce evil, giving birth to deception.
segments.speaker: Unknown
